intents.label: Review only
intents.description: The user wants to inspect, review, understand, summarize, or validate only the workbook structure/content without deciding whether it is ready for ingestion, mapping columns, staging records, comparing database changes, or publishing.

intents.label: Mapping readiness
intents.description: The user wants workbook review plus ingestion readiness, suitability/validity for import, PMO schema fit, mapping preparation, or column alignment, but does not ask to stage records, compare database changes, or publish changes.

intents.label: Stage and preview
intents.description: The user wants to ingest, load, normalize, stage, compare, or preview database changes without explicitly publishing.

intents.label: Publish after approval
intents.description: The user explicitly wants to publish, apply, commit, sync, update canonical PMO data, or otherwise write approved changes to target tables.
